title: Merge the compounding-complete dedupe-default-config-templates worktree into main
action: Feature dedupe-default-config-templates (PBI-045) is compounding-complete: 6 cells capped, unified all 3 default-config templates (ensure_config, doctor, install.sh/install.ps1) to a single canonical source via a hidden --internal-print-default-config CLI branch. Commit main's and the worktree's trailing bookkeeping, then bee worktree merge --id herdr-gateway--wt--dedupe-default-config-templates --cleanup. Run the full verify chain on the merged tree before commit.

truths: Main's and the worktree's pre-merge bookkeeping-only dirty state is committed before the merge runs
git merge --no-ff wt/dedupe-default-config-templates lands on main
The configured verify passes against the merged tree before the merge commit
No conflict markers remain in any merged file
--cleanup removes the worktree, deletes wt/dedupe-default-config-templates, and drops its grant
prohibitions: Do not commit the merge on a red verify
Never revert or renumber any docs/backlog.md row the user hand-edited

verify: git log --oneline -1 | grep -qi 'merge' && ! grep -rl '^<<<<<<<' --include='*' -- . 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -q . && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -qv dedupe-default-config-templates && echo MERGE_OK
